title: Item Counter
description: A highly customizable UI that displays the number of items in your inventory. Works as a PVP Item counter, totem counter, potion counter, etc.
body:
Very customizable mod to count up to 10 items in any part of your gui. Also works with potions.

Settings:
- Size, position, color of overlay
- Formatting of the item count
- Number of items to track
- For each item:
  - Item type to track
  - If item is potion:
    - Potion type
    - Required form (any, lingering, splash, regular)
    - Require boosted duration
    - Require boosted level
